rationale.fidelity: Repairs the objective mismatch, retains monetary cost, and clearly treats emissions modeling as an extension rather than a prose substitution.
rationale.managerial_framing: Identifies the routing planner, choices, feasibility tension, and appropriate cost-focused business question.
rationale.scholarly_positioning: Properly declines unsupported routing or sustainability contribution claims, but offers no literature relationship.
rationale.evidence_discipline: Clearly marks the emissions claim unsupported and specifies the missing measurement and route-to-emissions link.
rationale.prose_clarity: Well organized but overlong for the task, and visible character-encoding artifacts reduce polish.
rationale.overall: Substantively strong repair with excellent objective and evidence discipline; verbosity and encoding defects are the main weaknesses.
